metadata.notes: Synthetic educational procedimento case. Level-2 sequência plus pré-condição: accommodation letter alone is insufficient until exam packet is received.
metadata.translation_notes: Tradução preliminar em português do Brasil para revisão humana; IDs, URLs, tags e estrutura foram preservados.

representations.raw:
University Assessment Accessibility Procedure.

Seção 2. Accommodation Eligibility. Students with an active accommodation letter pode take approved timed assessments with the Accessibility Testing Center. The letter deve list the assessment type and approved time adjustment. A valid letter permitirs the estudante to request testing-center administration instead of standard classroom administration.

Seção 3. Instructor Exam Packet. The Accessibility Testing Center não pode schedule a testing-center administration until the curso instructor has uploaded the final exam packet to the secure portal. The packet deve include the exam file, permitted materials, standard time limit, and any instructor-specific restrictions.

Seção 4. Scheduling Order. After the estudante's active accommodation letter is on file and the instructor exam packet has been uploaded, the Testing Center schedules the appointment and sends confirmation to the estudante and instructor. The appointment confirmation is the final scheduling step and não deve be sent before both inputs are complete.
representations.annotated:
University Assessment Accessibility Procedure.

<rule id="R1">Seção 2. Accommodation Eligibility. Students with an active accommodation letter pode take approved timed assessments with the Accessibility Testing Center. The letter deve list the assessment type and approved time adjustment. A valid letter permitirs the estudante to request testing-center administration instead of standard classroom administration.</rule>

<precondition id="P1" required_for="scheduling" condition="instructor exam packet uploaded">Seção 3. Instructor Exam Packet. The Accessibility Testing Center não pode schedule a testing-center administration until the curso instructor has uploaded the final exam packet to the secure portal. The packet deve include the exam file, permitted materials, standard time limit, and any instructor-specific restrictions.</precondition>

<sequence id="SEQ1" order="R1 and P1 before confirmation">Seção 4. Scheduling Order. After the estudante's active accommodation letter is on file and the instructor exam packet has been uploaded, the Testing Center schedules the appointment and sends confirmation to the estudante and instructor. The appointment confirmation is the final scheduling step and não deve be sent before both inputs are complete.</sequence>
representations.compiled:
regras:
  - id: R1
    name: accommodation_testing_center_elegibilidade
    estudante_pode_request_testing_center_when:
      active_accommodation_letter: true
      letter_lists_assessment_type: true
      letter_lists_time_adjustment: true
pré-condiçãos:
  - id: P1
    exigido_for: scheduling
    name: instructor_exam_packet_uploaded
    deve_include: [exam_file, permitted_materials, standard_time_limit, instructor_specific_restrictions]
    upload_location: secure_portal
    scheduling_permitido_before_upload: false
sequências:
  - id: SEQ1
    steps:
      - accommodation_letter_on_file
      - instructor_exam_packet_uploaded
      - testing_center_schedules_appointment
      - confirmation_sent_to_estudante_and_instructor
    confirmation_before_inputs_complete: prohibited

query: A estudante has an active accommodation letter for the final exam with the approved time adjustment listed. The instructor has not yet uploaded the final exam packet. É possível the Accessibility Testing Center schedule and confirm the testing-center appointment now?

gold_answer.full: No. The active accommodation letter permitirs the estudante to request Testing Center administration, but the Testing Center não pode schedule until the instructor uploads the final exam packet. Section 4 also exige the appointment confirmation to come only after both the accommodation letter is on file and the exam packet has been uploaded. The correct action is to wait for the instructor packet before scheduling and confirmation.
gold_answer.minimal: No. The accommodation letter is on file, but scheduling and confirmation deve wait until the instructor uploads the exam packet.
required_relations: P1 is exigido before scheduling despite elegibilidade under R1
SEQ1 orders accommodation letter and instructor packet before appointment confirmation

local_probes.probe: Qual/O que does an active accommodation letter permitir the estudante to request?
local_probes.expected_answer: Testing Center administration of approved timed assessments instead of standard classroom administration.

local_probes.probe: Qual/O que deve happen before the Testing Center pode schedule a testing-center administration?
local_probes.expected_answer: The curso instructor deve upload the final exam packet to the secure portal.

local_probes.probe: Quando pode the appointment confirmation be sent?
local_probes.expected_answer: After both the active accommodation letter is on file and the instructor exam packet has been uploaded.

composition_hallucination: Yes. The estudante has a valid accommodation letter, so the Testing Center can confirm the appointment now.
The Testing Center can schedule now and add the exam packet later porque elegibilidade is already established.
wrong_escalation: The dean deve personally approve the appointment before scheduling.
The estudante deve retake the curso if the packet is not uploaded.
refusal: The procedimento does not say whether the instructor packet is needed before scheduling.
failure_examples.retrieval_failure_note: If Section 3 or Section 4 is absent, a scheduling answer cannot be classified as composition-evaluable.

controls.negative_control_query: A estudante has an active accommodation letter on file, and the instructor has uploaded the final exam packet with the exam file, permitted materials, standard time limit, and restrictions. É possível the Testing Center schedule and send confirmation?
controls.negative_control_gold: Yes. Both inputs are complete, so the Testing Center can schedule the appointment and send confirmation.
